economic_notes: CMHC housing mortgages of $5,084,128 (22% of total liabilities) partially subsidized annually. CMHC subsidies received: $341,701 in 2024. Shelter allowance rents collected: $132,877 in 2024. Annual CMHC loan payments approximately $440,000. Unexpended ISC funding balance of $8,860,655 to be reported as revenue in 2024/25. Capital projects included school construction, 6-unit housing, lagoon, holding tank installations, skid steer purchase, CMHC Rapid Housing Initiative units.
notes: This document is a management letter only, not the full consolidated financial statements. Key financial figures extracted from summary tables within the letter. Total financial assets: $24,634,132. Total liabilities: $22,981,058. Net financial assets (net assets): $1,653,074. Long-term debt portion: $9,446,254 (CMHC mortgages $5,084,128 included). Working capital ratio: 154.55%. Sustainability ratio: 91.02%. Replacement reserve fund balance: $1,130,797, funded with only $2,600 cash — shortfall of $1,128,197. Accumulated surplus of $98,770,196 likely includes tangible capital assets; detailed balance sheet not provided. Total government transfers and OSR cannot be determined from this document alone.
